title: hypolepis hawaiiensis var. mauiensis
intro: Hypolepis hawaiiensis var. mauiensis is a plant species that belongs to the lycopodiopsid fern group and is native to the islands of Hawaii, specifically on the island of Maui. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hypolepis hawaiiensis var. mauiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
